title: An Act to Enact the All Maine Health Act
committee: Health Coverage, Insurance and Financial Services
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 27, 2025
last_house_action: 5/1/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on May 1, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on HEALTH COVERAGE, INSURANCE AND FINANCIAL SERVICES pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
last_senate_action: 5/27/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
